title: Fresh Dwarf
description: This resource pack changes the player model to a dwarf
body:
EMF and ETF Required!
This resource pack changes the player model to a dwarf and adds a beard with physics



New update! Now 2 dwarves classic and slim. You can select the dwarf model by selecting the player model
![classic and slim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33f092b5769e109207e944b1dc75b8fe16bc951a.png)

Respect to Soul_Luos for your help, Thanks bro!


Baruk khazâd khazâd ai-mênu!
